rationale: Review 2's sole finding is correct and material: the module title in the added Galois.lean docstring explicitly overclaims 'elementary abelian' (i.e. the ≅ (ℤ/2)ⁿ identification) while the body, main results, and PR diff all defer that to a later step and only prove exponent 2 + abelian. Acting on it produces more accurate docs; Review 1's approve leaves the mismatch.
